title: Batch & PowerShell Scripting
description: Dasar-dasar scripting di Windows menggunakan Batch Script (.bat/.cmd) dan PowerShell (.ps1).

commands.name: batch-basics
commands.title: Batch Script — Dasar
commands.description: Dasar-dasar Batch script (.bat/.cmd) untuk otomasi tugas di CMD.
commands.examples:
@echo off
rem === Script Backup ===
echo Mulai backup...

set SOURCE=C:\Data
set DEST=D:\Backup
set DATE=%date:~-4,4%%date:~-7,2%%date:~-10,2%

robocopy %SOURCE% %DEST%\%DATE% /e /mt:8

if %errorlevel% leq 3 (
    echo Backup berhasil!
) else (
    echo Backup GAGAL!
    exit /b 1
)

pause

commands.name: batch-variables
commands.title: Batch — Variabel & Kondisi
commands.description: Variabel, kondisi if/else, dan operasi string di Batch script.

commands.name: batch-loops
commands.title: Batch — Loop & Iterasi
commands.description: Perintah loop di Batch script untuk iterasi file, angka, dan output perintah.
commands.notes: Di script (.bat) gunakan %%var, di CMD langsung gunakan %var.

commands.name: ps-basics
commands.title: PowerShell Script — Dasar
commands.description: Dasar-dasar PowerShell scripting (.ps1) untuk otomasi modern di Windows.

commands.name: ps-advanced
commands.title: PowerShell — Kontrol & Error Handling
commands.description: Kontrol alur, error handling, dan fitur lanjutan PowerShell.
commands.syntax:
if (kondisi) { } elseif (kondisi) { } else { }
try { } catch { } finally { }
